simple_types.name: Status_Type
simple_types.code: type Status_Type is (Available, Playing, Finished, Canceled, Failed);

tagged_types.name: Context
tagged_types.code: type Context is tagged limited private;

tagged_types.name: Sound
tagged_types.code: type Sound is tagged limited private;

documentation.description: Wait until the status is no longer Playing

subprograms.name: Belongs_To
subprograms.code: function Belongs_To (Object : Sound; Subject : Context'Class) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Return True if the sound was created by the given context, False otherwise

If True, then procedure Cancel can be used to cancel playing the sound.

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code: function Create (Name, ID, Icon : String := "") return Context

subprograms.name: Play
subprograms.code: procedure Play (Object : in out Context; Event_ID : String)

documentation.description:
Play an event sound and wait for it to finish playing

Raises Not_Found_Error if the event was not found.

subprograms.name: Play

documentation.description:
Play an event or music sound and return the sound so that it can
be optionally cancelled

This subprogram returns immediately and does not wait for the sound
to finish playing.

Raises Not_Found_Error if the event was not found.

subprograms.name: Play_File

documentation.description:
Play an audio file and return the sound so that it can
be optionally cancelled

This subprogram returns immediately and does not wait for the sound
to finish playing.

Raises Not_Found_Error if the file was not found.

subprograms.name: Set_Property
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Property (Object : Context; Property, Value : String)

documentation.description: Return the current status of the sound
